start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Loneliness is a plague. It's a plague that haunts the heart. It is agonizing.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I wish to be wanted more than anything, to matter to at least someone.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: It's a cruel fate laid upon me, for reasons I cannot comprehend why.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Ever since I was a child, I was not given the sufficient amount of affection for proper functioning.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: A lonely child, now a lonely adult.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: It truly feels like it won't get better.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: And it probably won't. I'll probably be like this forever until I eventually pass.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: The lack of affection, attention, recognition makes life an unforgiving hell.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: That is ultimately my life. A blatant hell caused by loneliness and neglect.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: And I'm so tired of it.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Like really tired. Total exhaustion. If how tired I am of being alone and suffering from loneliness was converted into physical fatigue, I wouldn't be able to move a finger even an inch.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I don't wanna be lonely anymore!!! I wanna be loved and adored!! So why can't I get that!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: It's so tough out here, being a stupid loner girl.........

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGGGGGGGGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: It's not fair, it's not fair, it's not fair, it's not fair!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I don't like that everyone else gets to be normal and get affection and I don't!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I know it's bad to be jealous or to hate!!! But I just can't help it!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Why'd I have to turn out this way and have these life circumstances?!?!?!?!?!?!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGGGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I'm gonna fucking go postal on myself at this point!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: AND I'LL NEVER HAVE THAT WILL I!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGGGGGGGGGGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I need to distract myself. I need to find something to distract myself. I can't bear with this loneliness any longer!!!!

start.name: COMPUTER
start.text: Notification - DarkAngel is streaming!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: My favorite streamer!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: She's like my idol!!!

start.name: DarkAngel
start.text: Hello Darklings! It's your favorite, awesome, kawaii streamer DarkAngel-chan!!

start.name: DarkAngel
start.text: In this stream, we're gonna watch Elfen Lead together!!!

start.name: DarkAngel
start.text: Make sure to grab your popcorn, pull up the anime on your platform of choice, and get ready to watch it with me!

start.name: DarkAngel
start.text: Okay, let us begi-

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Holy shit.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I can't believe it took me this long to realize the solution to my loneliness.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: It was right in my face, nearly everyday.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: DarkAngel-chan, she's a streamer. What stops me from being one? nothing

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I can get rid of my loneliness. I'll become famous and get all the attention I need.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I'll never feel alone again.

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I'm a fucking genius!!!!!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: But what'll I call myself... I need a good name

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Aha!! I just got an idea!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Etsuko... plus... kokoro... equals... Etsukokoro!!!!!!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: And I am...

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Hmm....

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Can't do an angel... DarkAngel-chan's already one...

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Can't do a devil... 'cause  I just don't wanna.......

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: Why not be myself? I think a menhera's pretty interesting by herself!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I don't need to put any sort of facade... no angel, devil, doggirl, catgirl, anything!!!!

start.name: Etsuko
start.text: I am Etsukokoro, menhera streamer!!!
